commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a memory reranker SDK/registry, moves built-in MMR into a bundled `memory-mmr` plugin, adds a `memory-external-reranker` plugin for Cohere-compatible `/v1/rerank` endpoints, and exposes new MMR provider/fallback config fields.

PR surface: Source +614, Tests +347, Docs +732, Config +101, Other +16. Total +1810 across 43 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; current main does not provide remote reranker endpoint support, while the PR body includes after-patch runtime logs and a screenshot showing the feature path in use.
